knowledge.html:
II. STRESS (TRỌNG ÂM)

I. Trọng âm với tu có 2 âm tiết

Đối với động từ có 2 âm tiết, trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết thu hai.

VerbPronunciation
invite/in'vait/
appeal/ə'piːl/
support/sə'pɔːrt/
surprise/sə'praiz/
prepare/pri'peə(r)/
decide/di'said/
prefer/pri'fɜː(r)/
advise/əd'vaiz/

Exception: Động từ có hai âm tiết những âm tiết thu hai chua nguyên âm /i/, /ə/, /əʊ/: trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết thu nhất.

VerbPronunciation
borrow/'bɒrəʊ/
loosen/luːs(ə)n/
tighten/'tait(ə)n/
enter/'entə(r)/
offer/'ɒfə(r)/
finish/'fɪnɪʃ/
widen/'waid(ə)n/

Đối với danh từ, tính từ va trạng từ có 2 âm tiết, trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết thu nhất.

Word (N, Adj, Adv)Pronunciation
people/'piːpl/
mother/'mʌðə(r)/
student/'stjuːdnt/
ready/'redi/
happy/'hæpi/
easy/'iːzi/
seldom/'seldəm/
often/'ɒftən/

II. Trọng âm với tu co 3 âm tiết

Trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết thu ba tính từ âm tiết cuối tro nguoc len.

Chung ta có thể dung phương pháp dem nguoc.

Ví dụ: Fa-mi-ly / 1<=2<=3. Dem nguoc tu 3->2->1, trọng âm rồi vao am được dem so 1 (trong ví dụ la 'FA')

WordPronunciation
family/'fæməli/
internet/'intərnet/
dedicate/'dedikeit/
satisfy/'sætisfai/
qualify/'kwɒlifai/

Đối với các tu tận cùng bằng: ian, ic, ience, ient, ial, ual, al, eous, ion, iar, trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết ngay phía trước chung.

WordPronunciation
athletic/æθ'letik/
essential/i'senʃl/
familiar/fə'miliə(r)/
delicious/di'liʃəs/
physician/fi'ziʃn/

Đối với các tu tận cùng bằng: ee, eer, ese, ier, ette, oo, esque, trọng âm thường rơi vao âm tiết chua các đuôi nay.

WordPronunciation
refugee/refju'dʒiː/
engineer/endʒi'niə(r)/
kangaroo/kæŋgə'ruː/
volunteer/vɒlən'tiə(r)/
Vietnamese/viːetnə'miːz/

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Below' has stress on the 2nd syllable (be-LOW), while bathroom, body, city all stress the 1st syllable.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Cartoon' has stress on the 2nd syllable (car-TOON), while country, early, husband stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Collect' has stress on the 2nd syllable (col-LECT), while river, paper, lesson stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Locate' has stress on the 2nd syllable (lo-CATE), while sometimes, student, tired stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Behave' has stress on the 2nd syllable (be-HAVE), while under, very, yellow stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Bamboo' has stress on the 2nd syllable (bam-BOO), while winter, weather, after stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Improve' has stress on the 2nd syllable (im-PROVE), while study, sugar, summer stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Repair' has stress on the 2nd syllable (re-PAIR), while window, table, sorry stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Repair' has stress on the 2nd syllable (re-PAIR), while ready, player, person stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Become' has stress on the 2nd syllable (be-COME), while shopping, travel, website stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Interest' has stress on the 1st syllable (IN-terest), while economy, suggestion, detective stress the 2nd syllable.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Borrow' has stress on the 1st syllable (BOR-row), while prefer, forget, pollute stress the 2nd.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Forecast' has stress on the 1st syllable (FORE-cast), while predict, depend, prepare stress the 2nd.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Convenient' has stress on the 2nd syllable (con-VE-nient), while national, possible, necessary stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Understand' has stress on the 3rd syllable (un-der-STAND), while encourage, adventure, remember stress the 2nd.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Begin' has stress on the 2nd syllable (be-GIN), while better, player, doctor stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Behind' has stress on the 2nd syllable (be-HIND), while teacher, picture, mother stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Today' has stress on the 2nd syllable (to-DAY), while many, only, music stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Immersion' has stress on the 2nd syllable (im-MER-sion), while operate, breadwinner, visit stress the 1st.

exercises.question: Choose the word whose stress is different from the others.
exercises.explanation: 'Applied' has stress on the 2nd syllable (ap-PLIED), while tender, rubber, sprinkle stress the 1st.
